```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 2)
assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_output_measurement"
assert hidden_period == "11"
assert num_input_qubits == 2

expected_pairs = {
    "00": {"00", "11"},
    "11": {"00", "11"},
}

total = 0
for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    assert isinstance(bitstring, str)
    assert len(bitstring) == 2 * num_input_qubits
    input_bits = bitstring[:num_input_qubits]
    output_bits = bitstring[num_input_qubits:]
    assert output_bits in expected_pairs
    assert input_bits in expected_pairs[output_bits]
    total += count

assert total == shots
assert set(counts.keys()) <= {"0000", "1100", "0011", "1111"}
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 2)

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_output_measurement"
assert hidden_period == "11"

expected_pairs = {
    "00": {"00", "11"},
    "11": {"00", "11"},
    "01": {"01", "10"},
    "10": {"01", "10"},
}

seen_output_branches = set()

for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    assert c > 0
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 2 * num_input_qubits

    input_bits = s[:num_input_qubits]
    output_bits = s[num_input_qubits:]

    assert output_bits in expected_pairs
    assert input_bits in expected_pairs[output_bits]
    seen_output_branches.add(output_bits)

assert seen_output_branches
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 2)
assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_output_measurement"
assert num_input_qubits == 2
assert hidden_period == "11"

expected_pairs = {
    "00": {"00", "11"},
    "11": {"00", "11"},
    "01": {"01", "10"},
    "10": {"01", "10"},
}

seen_outputs = set()
total = 0

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    assert isinstance(bitstring, str)
    assert len(bitstring) == 2 * num_input_qubits
    input_bits = bitstring[:num_input_qubits]
    output_bits = bitstring[num_input_qubits:]
    assert input_bits in expected_pairs[output_bits]
    seen_outputs.add(output_bits)
    total += count

assert total == shots
assert seen_outputs.issubset(set(expected_pairs))
assert len(seen_outputs) >= 1
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 2)
assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_output_measurement"
assert num_input_qubits == 2
assert hidden_period == "11"

def_bitstrings = set()
for key, count in counts.items():
    assert count >= 0
    bits = key.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(bits) == 2 * num_input_qubits
    input_bits = bits[-num_input_qubits:]
    output_bits = bits[:-num_input_qubits]
    def_bitstrings.add((output_bits, input_bits))

observed_by_output = {}
for output_bits, input_bits in def_bitstrings:
    observed_by_output.setdefault(output_bits, set()).add(input_bits)

for output_bits, inputs in observed_by_output.items():
    assert len(inputs) == 2
    a, b = sorted(inputs)
    xor = "".join("1" if x != y else "0" for x, y in zip(a, b))
    assert xor == hidden_period

assert len(observed_by_output) == 2
assert set(observed_by_output.keys()) == {"00", "11"}
all_inputs = set()
for inputs in observed_by_output.values():
    all_inputs |= inputs
assert all_inputs == {"00", "11", "01", "10"}
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 2)
assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_output_measurement"
assert num_input_qubits == 2
assert hidden_period == "11"

expected_pairs = {
    "00": {"00", "11"},
    "11": {"00", "11"},
    "01": {"01", "10"},
    "10": {"01", "10"},
}

assert counts, "counts must be non-empty"

seen_outputs = {}
total = 0

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    assert count >= 0
    total += count
    assert len(bitstring) >= 4
    input_bits = bitstring[-2:]
    output_bits = bitstring[-4:-2]
    assert output_bits in expected_pairs, f"unexpected output register value {output_bits}"
    allowed_inputs = expected_pairs[output_bits]
    assert input_bits in allowed_inputs, (
        f"for output {output_bits}, observed input {input_bits} is not in expected collapsed pair {allowed_inputs}"
    )
    seen_outputs.setdefault(output_bits, set()).add(input_bits)

assert total == shots, f"total counts {total} != shots {shots}"

for output_bits, observed_inputs in seen_outputs.items():
    assert observed_inputs == expected_pairs[output_bits], (
        f"output branch {output_bits} did not realize the expected pair; "
        f"observed {observed_inputs}, expected {expected_pairs[output_bits]}"
    )
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
```
```python
n = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 2)
assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_output_measurement"
assert n == 2
assert hidden_period == "11"

expected_pairs = {
    "00": {"00", "11"},
    "01": {"01", "10"},
}

total = 0
seen_outputs = set()

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    s = str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 2 * n
    input_bits = s[:n]
    output_bits = s[n:]
    assert output_bits in expected_pairs
    assert input_bits in expected_pairs[output_bits]
    seen_outputs.add(output_bits)
    total += count

assert total == shots
assert set(counts.keys())
for output_bits in seen_outputs:
    observed_inputs = {
        str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")[:n]
        for bitstring, count in counts.items()
        if count > 0 and str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")[n:] == output_bits
    }
    assert observed_inputs == expected_pairs[output_bits]
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 2)
```

```python
    output_bits = bitstring[num_input_qubits:]

    assert input_bits in expected_pairs[output_bits]
    seen_inputs.add(input_bits)
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 2)

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_output_measurement"
assert hidden_period == "11"
assert num_input_qubits == 2

expected_pairs = {
    "00": {"00", "11"},
    "11": {"00", "11"},
    "01": {"01", "10"},
    "10": {"01", "10"},
}

total = 0
seen_outputs = set()

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    assert count >= 0
    assert len(bitstring) == 2 * num_input_qubits

    input_bits = bitstring[:num_input_qubits]
    output_bits = bitstring[num_input_qubits:]

    assert output_bits in expected_pairs
    assert input_bits in expected_pairs[output_bits]

    seen_outputs.add(output_bits)
    total += count

assert total == shots

for output_bits in seen_outputs:
    allowed_inputs = expected_pairs[output_bits]
    observed_inputs = {
        bitstring[:num_input_qubits]
        for bitstring, count in counts.items()
        if count > 0 and bitstring[num_input_qubits:] == output_bits
    }
    assert observed_inputs == allowed_inputs
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")

    "01": {"01", "10"},

    input_bits = bitstring[:num_input_qubits]
    output_bits = bitstring[num_input_qubits:]

    assert output_bits in expected_pairs
    assert input_bits in expected_pairs[output_bits]

    seen_outputs.add(output_bits)
```
```python
    total += count
```

```python
    "0000", "1100",
    "0111", "1011",
    "0101", "1001",
    "0010", "1110",
}
```
